project_type: Full-stack care home management app (CareVista) - Express backend + React frontend
build_system: npm with tsc for backend, vite for frontend
build_command: cd backend && npm run build && cd ../frontend && npm run build
verification_instructions: 1. Run cd backend && npx tsc --noEmit to verify backend compiles. 2. Run cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit to verify frontend compiles. 3. Run cd backend && npm run build. 4. Run cd frontend && npm run build.
setup_instructions: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
key_patterns: Controllers use query() from models/db for raw SQL. Routes registered in backend/src/routes/index.ts. Frontend uses Axios-based api.ts service module. Migrations are numbered SQL files in backend/migrations/.
directory_structure: backend/src/controllers/ - all controller files. backend/src/routes/index.ts - all route registrations. backend/migrations/ - SQL migration files 001-013. frontend/src/services/api.ts - all frontend API client definitions. frontend/src/pages/ - all page components.
